name: git_stash
description: Stash the changes in a dirty working directory (git stash).

directory.description: The directory to run git stash in

include_untracked.description: When true, include untracked files in the stash.

name.description: Optional name for the stash (used as the stash message)

staged_only.description: When true, stash only the currently staged changes and leave unstaged work untouched.
